news.headline: Tax Council in Denmark suggests bill to tax unrealized gains/losses on crypto assets from 2026.
news.summary: A proposal by Denmark's Tax Law Council suggests implementing a bill that may tax unrealized profits and losses on cryptocurrency assets starting in 2026.

NetEase Cloud Music secures exclusive 30-day premiere for Kakao Entertainment's latest K-POP hits in China.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China on October 23, 2024, NetEase Cloud Music, a top online music platform in China, has announced a collaboration with Kakao Entertainment, a major South Korean entertainment company. Together, they will introduce new K-POP tracks in China. The launch will take place on October 24, 2024, marking a significant partnership between the two companies.

news.headline: Aoki refrains from discussing current FX levels.
Toshiba launches automotive photorelay with 900V withstand voltage, ideal for high voltage battery apps.
news.summary: In Kawasaki, Japan, Toshiba has introduced a compact automotive photorelay designed for high voltage battery applications. This new photorelay boasts an output withstand voltage of 900V, making it well-suited for such uses.

news.headline: Elevate celebrations with Cristalino Tequila: smooth, bright, trending style to wow guests.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Mission, Kansas, a new tequila style is making waves with its vibrant, sleek, and refined flavors, perfect for enhancing any celebration. This trending tequila offers a sophisticated twist that is bound to impress guests. So, grab your finest glassware and elevate your next gathering with this exceptional drink choice. Whether you're marking a significant event...

news.headline: Korea Zinc surges 30% amid anticipation of buyback outcome.
2024 ESG Global Leaders Conference concludes in Shanghai with 270+ global leaders for sustainable development. #ESGProsperity.
news.summary: The recently concluded 2024 ESG Global Leaders Conference in Beijing, which is the largest event of its kind in China, was a significant success. With the theme "ESG Synergy: Uniting for Global Prosperity," the conference took place in Huangpu District, Shanghai, from October 21-23, 2024. This event gathered a record number of attendees, with over 2,000 global leaders, policymakers, and experts participating to discuss the importance of environmental, social, and governance (ESG) issues. The conference aimed to address key challenges and opportunities in sustainable development, with a focus on collaboration for global prosperity.

news.headline: James Jeffrey discusses North Korean troops sent to Russia on Bloomberg. Check it out!
China 30-year bond futures rise by 0.3% following PBOC's increase of cash injection.
Tesla maintains its $184 million Bitcoin holding unchanged for the 5th consecutive quarter, now holding 11,509 BTC.
news.summary: Tesla Inc. announced that it did not sell any of its Bitcoin holdings in the third quarter, marking the fifth consecutive quarter of holding onto the digital assets. This decision was disclosed in the company's recent earnings report following the market's closure, where it revealed possessing $184 million in digital assets. Although Tesla does not provide a detailed breakdown of its digital holdings, tracking firms suggest that the majority consists of Bitcoin, with the firm reportedly owning 11,509 Bitcoins.

Yellen to Speak at 30 am ET
PBOC injects highest net amount in reverse repos since July 16
Cavco Industries, Inc. to release Q2 earnings on Oct 31, 2024, followed by a webcast on Nov 1, 2024 at 1:00 pm EST.
news.summary: Phoenix-based company Cavco Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: CVCO) is set to announce its earnings for the second quarter ending on September 28, 2024, on October 31, 2024, after the market closes. The company's senior management will hold a live webcast on November 1, 2024, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results.

Jiangxi people in Zambia essay competition award ceremony and seminar held in Nanchang, China on Oct. 14, 2024.
news.summary: On October 14, 2024, in Nanchang, China, the award ceremony and seminar for the "Jiangxi people in Zambia" essay competition took place, as reported by the Jiangxi International Communication Center. The event was sponsored by the Jiangxi Enterprise Association.

news.headline: A Ghanaian student, Moses Arthur Baidoo, serves at Beijing Summit of FOCAC as an international representative.
news.summary: In Nanchang, China on October 24, 2024, a report by the Jiangxi International Communication Center revealed that Moses Arthur Baidoo, an international student from Ghana studying at East China University of Technology, played a key role during the Beijing Summit of the Forum on China-Africa Cooperation (FOCAC).

news.headline: "Online exhibition 'Henan, Where China Began - Journey of Civilization Light' launched by Henan Province, showcasing rich history. Luxembour, Oct. 24, 2024."
news.summary: Luxembourg - On October 24, 2024, the Culture and Tourism department of Henan Province officially launched the online exhibition "Henan, Where China Began-'Journey of Civilization Light'". This thematic exhibition marks an important milestone showcasing the rich cultural heritage of the region.

news.headline: Jiangxi hosts Species Talk Show showcasing its 166,000 sq km natural beauty & green ecology wealth.
news.summary: In a recent report from the Jiangxi International Communication Center (JXICC) based in Nanchang, China, it was highlighted that Jiangxi covers over 166,000 square kilometers of land, showcasing diverse natural landscapes including forests, lakes, and mountains. The region's lush green ecology has been emphasized as its most valuable asset, attracting significant attention to its environmental wealth.

news.headline: TIER IV introduces GMSL2-10GbE module with Analog Devices, advancing autonomous driving technology.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024 in Tokyo, TIER IV revealed the introduction of the GMSL2™ -10GbE conversion module, a result of collaboration with global partners. This innovation arises from their groundbreaking open-source software for autonomous driving. This module facilitates the conversion of Gigabit Multimedia Serial Link generation 2 to 10 Gigabit Ethernet, signifying a significant step in advancing autonomous driving technology.

news.headline: Casio introduces MRG-B2000JS inspired by Japanese katana swords, part of the MR-G line, the flagship of G-SHOCK.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Casio Computer Co., Ltd. unveiled a latest model in the MR-G line of G-SHOCK watches in Tokyo. The new MRG-B2000JS pays tribute to the Jyuroku-Maru: San, a Japanese katana sword specially created by Casio. This release enhances the flagship range known for its shock resistance features.

news.headline: American Airlines introduces new boarding system to deter early boarders; testing tech that signals when passengers jump the queue.
news.summary: American Airlines is trialing a new technology platform that will emit a noise if a passenger tries to board a flight before their designated group is called.

news.headline: Singtel and Western Union agree on sale of Dash, Singapore's mobile wallet app with 1.4M users. Sale pending regulatory approval.
news.summary: In Singapore, Singtel and Western Union have signed a conditional agreement for the sale of Dash, pending regulatory approvals. The mobile wallet, launched in 2014, is a popular all-in-one platform for payments, remittances, savings, investments, and insurance. With over 1.4 million users, Dash offers convenient services to customers irrespective of their telecom provider or bank. During the transition period, existing Dash customers will retain access to all current functionalities.

news.headline: OpenBoxLab Inc. launches RaiDrive for Linux after success on Windows - CEO Chongho Kim's mission for innovative solutions.
news.summary: OpenBoxLab Inc. has recently rolled out RaiDrive for Linux in response to the widespread popularity of RaiDrive for Windows. The new release is designed to work seamlessly across different Linux distributions, catering to a large user base interested in leveraging RaiDrive's robust functionalities. CEO Chongho Kim expressed the company's commitment to delivering cutting-edge solutions that address the needs of Linux users worldwide.

news.headline: Tune in to Bloomberg for Balance of Power on 10/23/24.
Xi and Modi reached an agreement after Indian corporations pushed for progress for several months.
Kamala Harris criticizes Trump for reportedly praising Hitler.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the total number of COVID-19 cases has reached over 5 million worldwide, with over 300,000 deaths recorded. The United States remains the most affected country, with over 1.5 million cases and 90,000 deaths. In response to the pandemic, governments have imposed strict lockdown measures to contain the spread of the virus. The global economy has been severely impacted, with millions of people losing their jobs and facing financial uncertainty. Scientists worldwide are working tirelessly to develop a vaccine to combat the virus, with several potential candidates currently in the testing phase. As the situation continues to evolve, healthcare systems are under immense pressure to provide care for those affected by the virus. The public is urged to follow health guidelines and practice social distancing to help flatten the curve and prevent further spread of the virus.

news.headline: Christy Baril promoted to Director of Water Quality and Environmental Compliance at California American Water, with 10 years experience.
news.summary: California American Water has appointed Christy Baril as the new Director of Water Quality and Environmental Compliance. In her new role, Baril will be responsible for managing all water quality and environmental operations across California for the company. With over 10 years of experience in water quality, compliance, operations, rates, and engineering, Baril is well-equipped to handle this role efficiently. Prior to her promotion, she served in various positions within the company.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures drop while Tesla surges; market slides but maintains key levels amidst rising Treasury yields.
news.summary: On Wednesday, key stock market indexes experienced a decline due to the continued increase in Treasury yields. Amid this trend, Tesla's stock saw a significant surge following impressive earnings results and positive news involving CEO Elon Musk. While the overall market faced a downturn, it managed to hold onto crucial support levels. This marked a volatile trading day where the Dow Jones futures dropped, contrasting with Tesla's remarkable performance.

news.headline: Indochino appoints Sean Wrenn as VP Retail Sales & Operations, bringing 20 years of experience to the team.
news.summary: Indochino, a leading made-to-measure apparel company based in Vancouver, BC, has recently appointed Sean Wrenn as their Vice President of Retail Sales & Operations. With more than two decades of experience in retail management, Sean will be overseeing the company's retail operations. This move comes as Indochino continues to solidify its position as the largest made-to-measure apparel company globally. The company's decision to bring Sean on board reflects their commitment to enhancing their retail sales strategies and operations.

Japanese Mfg PMI Flash Actual 49 (Forecast -, Previous 49.7)
Jibun Bank Japan October Services PMI: 49.3
Chinese President Xi Jinping outlined five major goals for 'Greater BRICS Cooperation' at the 16th BRICS Summit.
news.summary: On Wednesday, October 23, 2024 in Beijing, Chinese President Xi Jinping participated in the 16th BRICS Summit and presented a significant speech titled "Embracing a Broader View and Cutting Through the Fog of Challenges to Advance High-Quality Development of Greater BRICS."

news.headline: Ingram Micro prices IPO at $22 per share, offering 18.6 million shares; 11.6M by Ingram Micro and 7M by existing stockholders.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, Ingram Micro Holding Corporation unveiled the pricing of its initial public offering with 18,600,000 shares of common stock at $22.00 per share. This offering includes 11,600,000 shares from Ingram Micro and 7,000,000 shares to be sold by specific existing stockholders as noted in the registration statement. Ingram Micro will not be partaking in the proceeds from the sale of shares by the existing stockholders.

news.headline: Investigation launched for data breach at Boston Children's Health Physicians impacting patient records. 100+ characters
news.summary: A law firm based out of San Francisco, Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP, has launched an investigation into a data breach that has affected the private personal and health details of patients associated with Boston Children's Health Physicians, LLP and The Children's Hospital Corporation (doing business as Boston Children's). The breach is believed to have compromised sensitive information.

news.headline: Oil stabilizes after decline as focus remains on Middle East tensions and supply outlook.
Data breach at Omni Family Health affects 468,344 patient and employee records, investigation underway.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, legal firm Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP announced they are looking into a security incident affecting the sensitive data of 468,344 individuals associated with Omni Family Health, a healthcare provider in California. This breach compromised both personal and health information of patients and employees. The investigation commenced around October 18, 2024.

news.headline: Hope Medicine Inc. reports promising results from Phase 2 study of endometriosis treatment HMI-115, reducing pain by 42% and pelvic pain by 50%. Normal menstrual periods reported by most patients.
news.summary: The drug HMI-115 has shown a noteworthy improvement in reducing endometriosis pain, with a 42% decrease in mean dysmenorrhea pain score and a 50% reduction in mean non-menstrual pelvic pain score. Additionally, a majority of patients experienced normal menstrual periods post-treatment. There were no common peri-menopausal symptoms reported among the patients.
